CONTENT.Career: Bouebari is a youth product of Strasbourg, and was promoted to their reserves in 2022. He made his professional debut with Strasbourg in a 2–1 Ligue 1 win over Lyon on 14 January 2023, coming on as an early substitute and assisting his side's first goal.Bouebari joined SC Freiburg II in June 2023.
CONTENT.External links: Franci Bouebari at SoccerwayFranci Bouebari at Freiburg

SUMMARY: Franci Clarck Bouebari Kitsamoutse (born 12 September 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for SC Freiburg II in German 3. Liga.
